address_prefix.description: Defines the IP range in CIDR notation (e.g., 10.0.0.0/16)

name.description: Specifies the unique name for the resource

next_hop_in_ip_address.description: Optional next hop's IP address for routing

next_hop_type.description: Defines the type of next hop (e.g., VirtualAppliance, Internet)

route_table_name.description: Specifies the name of the route table to associate with

timeouts.description: Optional timeouts for create, read, update, and delete operations

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.
